title: Browser Developer Tools Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential panels and features found in modern web browser dev tools.

questions.question: What happens when you change an HTML tag's content in the Elements panel of DevTools?
options: The change is saved forever in the original source code.
The change is applied live to the page, but disappears when the page is refreshed.
The change only affects the browser's console.

questions.question: Which panel is primarily used to view JavaScript logs and execute scripts live against the page?
Which tool should you use to simulate an iPhone or Android device inside your desktop browser?
In which panel can you see every single file (images, scripts, styles) that the browser is downloading?
What is the fastest way to find a specific HTML element in the DevTools?
options: Scroll through the entire Elements panel.
Right-click the element on the actual page and select 'Inspect'.
Use the Console to write a script.
